items.title: A major hacking tool has leaked online, putting millions of iPhones at risk. Here’s what you need to know
items.content: Here’s what we know, and what you need to know, about Coruna and DarkSword, two advanced iPhone hacking tools discovered by security researchers. DarkSword has now leaked onli

items.title: Apple overhauls its app developer platform with 100 new metrics, more tools
items.content: Apple is adding 100+ new App Store Connect metrics, giving developers deeper, first-party insights into monetization, subscriptions, and user behavior as it doubles down on it

items.title: Arm is releasing the first in-house chip in its 35-year history
items.content: Arm is producing its own CPU for the first time. It developed the CPU with Meta, which is also the chip's first customer.

items.title: Ads are coming to Apple Maps, as Apple expands its business offerings
items.content: Apple Maps will launch ads this summer in the U.S. and Canada. Plus, a new suite of Apple Business offerings arrives April 14.

items.title: Microsoft rolls back some of its Copilot AI bloat on Windows
items.content: The company is reducing Copilot entry points on Windows, starting with Photos, Widgets, Notepad, and other apps.

items.title: Microsoft hires the team of Sequoia-backed AI collaboration platform, Cove
items.content: AI collaboration startup Cove is shutting down after its team joined Microsoft, with service ending April 1 and customer data set for deletion.

items.title: The billion-dollar infrastructure deals powering the AI boom
items.content: Here's everything we know about the biggest AI infrastructure projects, including major spending from Meta, Oracle, Microsoft, Google, and OpenAI.

items.title: The White House wants AI companies to cover rate hikes. Most have already said they would.
items.content: Many hyperscalers have already made public commitments to cover electricity cost increases.

items.title: How to Turn a Chicken Egg Into a Drug Factory
items.content: A biotech start-up is testing a novel way of efficiently producing pharmaceutical drugs.

items.title: War in Iran Will Push U.S. Inflation Above 4 Percent, O.E.C.D. Forecast Says
items.content: Higher energy prices and uncertainty over the war in the Middle East will boost inflation and weigh on economic growth, a new forecast says.

items.title: Shield AI, a Start-Up Making Military Drones, Raises $2 Billion
items.content: The company, which develops autonomous military technology, also plans to buy a maker of simulation software as interest in next-generation defense soars.

items.title: Is Big Tech Facing a Big Tobacco Moment?
items.content: Back-to-back courtroom losses have put technology giants, including Meta and Google, in uncertain territory as they face lawsuits and bans on teen users.
